pundit.name: Clint Dempsey
pundit.take: **"Mustard Boy" Zach couldn't grease his way past Rafe's Germany, but at least Brazil's samba'd his score to second place.** Zach got bold pickin' Saudi Arabia like they were the sleeping giants of the desert; turns out oil money doesn't translate to goals, my man. Now he's sittin' behind Devin, who's playin' it cool with Spain and the USA, puttin' in work like a true Ghost Pepper, steamin' up the leaderboard. Meanwhile, "The Backpass Assassin" Gayden is gettin' cooked, dreamin' that England's gonna save his bacon, but Turkey ain't exactly gonna be eatin' turkey legs against Devin's USA tomorrow — USA's rollin' like a freight train through Inglewood, and "Backpass Assassin's" gonna be backpassin' his way to more Ls, no doubt. You heard it here first, Devin's takin' this one home, no sweat.

pundit_takes.headline: Gayden Set to Redefine Underdog Status with Ivory Coast vs Curacao
pundit_takes.subtitle: Backpass Assassin aiming for new record: least expected points from favorites.

pundit_takes.headline: Devin Poised for Another Tactical Masterclass as USA Faces Turkey
pundit_takes.subtitle: Ghost Pepper’s fiery strategy includes not relying on ghost points.

pundit_takes.headline: Zach's Swiss Side Quietly Carries the Load with Win Over Canada
pundit_takes.subtitle: Mustard Boy ultimately saves his spice for the knockout rounds.

pundit_takes.headline: Rafe's Germany Positioned for Victory Against Ecuador, Remains Ineligible for Points
pundit_takes.subtitle: The Noisemaker drafted like a pro, if drafting non-qualifiers was the goal.

rome_analytics_quotes: Gayden's L1 streak is now as dead as his dinner conversations with Rafe.
Rafe's Tier-3 mess makes even Gumby look like a draft genius.
Rafe gives Devin a spanking: 6-point head-to-head beatdown. Take your ball and go.
Gunner's favorite odds are slipping faster than Haaland's goals against Haiti.
